prompt:
A polished Japanese fast-food promotional poster in a bright anime-advertisement style, combining a fantasy princess character with clean product photography and cheerful branding. The composition is landscape and split visually: on the left, a full-body anime girl inspired by a moon-princess or bamboo-princess aesthetic stands in a welcoming pose with one hand extended toward the viewer and the other hand near her face. She has very long flowing silver-white with pastel pink and lavender gradients hair, large expressive eyes, and an elegant floral-and-ribbon hair ornament in dark blue, gold, pink, and turquoise. Her outfit is a luxurious modernized kimono dress in white, teal, navy, and pink with translucent sleeves, floral patterns, layered obi bows, tassels, and gold ornaments, with a magical sparkling atmosphere around her. Behind her is a dreamy teal-and-cream background with soft circles, starry sparkles, faint floral motifs, sweeping decorative lines, and a subtle silhouette of a Japanese pagoda.

On the right is a neat food-ad layout for MOS BURGER, with the red MOS BURGER logo at the top left corner and again at the bottom right. At the top center-right, place a green ribbon banner with the Japanese text "モスバーガー特集". Below it, add a large elegant handwritten-style Japanese headline: "行きたくなる、できたてのおいしさ。" with the middle phrase "できたて" emphasized in vivid pink-red while the rest is black. Under that, add a smaller subheadline in Japanese: "ヤチヨ風の幻想感 × モスのごほうびバーガー". 

Feature exactly 4 food items arranged horizontally across the middle-right, each rendered as appetizing semi-photorealistic product shots with soft shadows and crisp detail. Item 1: a classic burger with bun, thick meat patty, sauce, mayonnaise, and a large tomato slice, with a red circular badge reading "定番人気" and the label "モスバーガー" plus small Japanese descriptive text beneath. Item 2: a teriyaki burger with lettuce and glossy sauce, with a green circular badge reading "和風人気" and the label "テリヤキバーガー" plus small Japanese descriptive text beneath. Item 3: a white paper carton of onion rings with a yellow circular badge reading "サイドも最高" and the label "オニポテ" plus small Japanese descriptive text beneath. Item 4: a pink milkshake in a clear cup with straw, with a blue circular badge reading "ひんやり甘い" and the label "モスシェイク" plus small Japanese descriptive text beneath. 

Below the products, add a rounded rectangular recommendation box with a teal border and a teal ribbon title reading "おすすめポイント". Inside, include exactly 4 bullet points in Japanese with pink flower-like bullets, describing made-to-order freshness, the appeal of the classic meat sauce and tomato burger, the Japanese-style popularity of teriyaki burger, and that onion rings and shake are also must-try items. To the right inside the same lower area, include a smaller rounded box with line-art icons of cutlery, a drink, and a burger, plus Japanese copy that reads "モスのこだわり" and "おいしさは、まごころから。" followed by smaller explanatory Japanese text.

Across the bottom, place a large curved banner with a teal gradient and white center glow containing the Japanese slogan "今日はモスに寄り道しよう。" with "モス" highlighted in bold red. Near the lower right, add a small orange-red circular callout with Japanese text similar to "あなたのお気に入りがきっと見つかる!". Use a crisp commercial poster layout, vivid teal, aqua, white, pink, and gold accents, glossy food rendering, decorative sparkles, and a premium collaboration feel between anime fantasy illustration and modern restaurant advertising.
